title: Annapoorneshwari Temple
tagline: Annapoorneshwari Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Annapoorneshwari Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Annapoorneshwari (Annapoorna), located at Horanadu, Karnataka, India, 100 km from Chikmagalur in the thick fo
overview.description: The Annapoorneshwari Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Annapoorneshwari (Annapoorna), located at Horanadu, Karnataka, India, 100 km from Chikmagalur in the thick forests and valleys of the Western Ghats of Karnataka. It is situated on the banks of river Bhadra.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Sri Parashakthi Kshetra
topPlaces.description: Sri Parashakthi Kshetra (Kannada: ಶ್ರೀ ಪರಾಶಕ್ತಿ ಕ್ಷೇತ್ರ, ಮಡ್ಯಾರು), a temple complex at Madyar, Kotekar. Madyar, located around 20 km from Mangalore, the port city of Karnataka, India where the Hindu goddess Vaishnavi is worshiped as the presiding deity.

topPlaces.name: Hornadu
topPlaces.description: Horanadu, also known as Sri Kshetra Horanadu, is a Panchayat village in Kalasa taluk of Chikkamagaluru district, Karnataka, India. It is the site of the Annapoorneshwari Temple.

topPlaces.name: Kalasa
topPlaces.description: Kalasa is a taluk located in Chikmagalur district in Karnataka. Kalasa is home to the Chandranatha Jain Basadi and Kalaseshwara Temple dedicated to Shiva.

items.note: Sri Parashakthi Kshetra (Kannada: ಶ್ರೀ ಪರಾಶಕ್ತಿ ಕ್ಷೇತ್ರ, ಮಡ್ಯಾರು), a temple complex at Madyar, Kotekar. Madyar, located around 20 km from Mangalore, the port city of Karnataka, India where the Hindu goddess Vaishnavi is worshiped as the presiding deity.
Horanadu, also known as Sri Kshetra Horanadu, is a Panchayat village in Kalasa taluk of Chikkamagaluru district, Karnataka, India. It is the site of the Annapoorneshwari Temple.
Kalasa is a taluk located in Chikmagalur district in Karnataka. Kalasa is home to the Chandranatha Jain Basadi and Kalaseshwara Temple dedicated to Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Annapoorneshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Annapoorneshwari Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Annapoorneshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Annapoorneshwari Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Annapoorneshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Annapoorneshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Annapoorneshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Annapoorneshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sri Parashakthi Kshetra, Hornadu, Kalasa.
